title: [HW][FIRRTL] Endian difference between struct and array

features.name: packed struct with multiple bit fields
features.description: Code should include a packed struct declaration with multiple logic bit fields to demonstrate field ordering
features.snippet: struct packed {logic e0; logic e1;} a;

features.name: unpacked array of logic elements
features.description: Code should include a 2-element unpacked array of logic to demonstrate array element ordering

features.name: struct assignment with concatenation
features.description: Code should include struct assigned via concatenation where first member gets first element in concat order
features.snippet:
struct packed {logic e0; logic e1;} a;
assign a = {s0, s1};

features.name: array assignment with concatenation
features.description: Code should include array assigned via concatenation where element 0 gets last element in concat order (LSB)

features.name: struct and array semantic equivalence with opposite concatenation order
features.description: Code should include both struct and array receiving same input values but with reversed concatenation order to achieve equivalent behavior
